# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Fetch and display a website preview based on the provided URL.
     *
     * @param  \Illuminate\Http\Request  $request
     * @return \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
     */
    public function preview(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors' => $validator->errors(),
            ], 422);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        // Validate the URL scheme to prevent SSRF and local file access
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);

        if (!$parsedUrl || !isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) || !in_array($parsedUrl['scheme'], ['http', 'https'])) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Only http and https URLs are allowed.',
            ], 422);
        }

        // Block private/internal IP ranges to prevent SSRF
        $host = $parsedUrl['host'] ?? '';

        if ($this->isInternalHost($host)) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'Access to internal resources is not allowed.',
            ], 403);
        }

        try {
            $htmlContent = $this->fetchUrl($url);

            if ($htmlContent === false) {
                return response()->json([
                    'success' => false,
                    'message' => 'Unable to fetch the provided URL.',
                ], 400);
            }

            $previewData = $this->extractPreviewData($htmlContent, $url);

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'data' => $previewData,
            ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'An error occurred while fetching the website preview.',
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Check if a host resolves to an internal/private IP address.
     *
     * @param  string  $host
     * @return bool
     */
    private function isInternalHost(string $host): bool
    {
        // Block localhost and common internal hostnames
        $blockedHosts = ['localhost', '127.0.0.1', '0.0.0.0', '::1'];

        if (in_array(strtolower($host), $blockedHosts)) {
            return true;
        }

        // Resolve the hostname and check if the IP is private/reserved
        $ip = gethostbyname($host);

        if ($ip === $host) {
            // DNS resolution failed
            return true;
        }

        if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false) {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Fetch the content of a URL using cURL.
     *
     * @param  string  $url
     * @return string|false
     */
    private function fetchUrl(string $url)
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL            => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS      => 3,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT      => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)',
            // Limit the response size to 2MB to prevent memory exhaustion
            CURLOPT_BUFFERSIZE     => 128,
            CURLOPT_NOPROGRESS     => false,
            CURLOPT_PROGRESSFUNCTION => function ($resource, $downloadSize, $downloaded) {
                // Abort if the download exceeds 2MB
                if ($downloaded > 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
                    return 1; // Returning non-zero aborts the transfer
                }
                return 0;
            },
            // Prevent cURL from following redirects to internal IPs
            CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS      => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
            CURLOPT_REDIR_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
        ]);

        $response = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $error = curl_error($ch);

        curl_close($ch);

        if ($response === false || $httpCode >= 400) {
            return false;
        }

        return $response;
    }

    /**
     * Extract preview data (title, description, image, etc.) from HTML content.
     *
     * @param  string  $html
     * @param  string  $url
     * @return array
     */
    private function extractPreviewData(string $html, string $url): array
    {
        $previewData = [
            'url'         => $url,
            'title'       => null,
            'description' => null,
            'image'       => null,
            'site_name'   => null,
            'type'        => null,
        ];

        // Suppress DOM parsing warnings for malformed HTML
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        $doc = new \DOMDocument();
        $doc->loadHTML(mb_convert_encoding($html, 'HTML-ENTITIES', 'UTF-8'));

        libxml_clear_errors();

        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);

        // Extract Open Graph meta tags
        $ogTags = [
            'og:title'       => 'title',
            'og:description' => 'description',
            'og:image'       => 'image',
            'og:site_name'   => 'site_name',
            'og:type'        => 'type',
        ];

        foreach ($ogTags as $property => $key) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@property='{$property}']/@content");
            if ($nodes->length > 0) {
                $previewData[$key] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Extract Twitter Card meta tags as fallback
        $twitterTags = [
            'twitter:title'       => 'title',
            'twitter:description' => 'description',
            'twitter:image'       => 'image',
        ];

        foreach ($twitterTags as $name => $key) {
            if (empty($previewData[$key])) {
                $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='{$name}']/@content");
                if ($nodes->length > 0) {
                    $previewData[$key] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
                }
            }
        }

        // Fallback to standard HTML tags
        if (empty($previewData['title'])) {
            $titleNodes = $xpath->query('//title');
            if ($titleNodes->length > 0) {
                $previewData['title'] = trim($titleNodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        if (empty($previewData['description'])) {
            $descNodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='description']/@content");
            if ($descNodes->length > 0) {
                $previewData['description'] = trim($descNodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Resolve relative image URLs to absolute
        if (!empty($previewData['image']) && !filter_var($previewData['image'], FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            $parsedBase = parse_url($url);
            $baseUrl = ($parsedBase['scheme'] ?? 'https') . '://' . ($parsedBase['host'] ?? '');
            if (str_starts_with($previewData['image'], '//')) {
                $previewData['image'] = ($parsedBase['scheme'] ?? 'https') . ':' . $previewData['image'];
            } elseif (str_starts_with($previewData['image'], '/')) {
                $previewData['image'] = $baseUrl . $previewData['image'];
            } else {
                $previewData['image'] = $baseUrl . '/' . $previewData['image'];
            }
        }

        // Sanitize output to prevent XSS
        foreach ($previewData as $key => $value) {
            if (is_string($value)) {
                $previewData[$key] = e($value);
            }
        }

        return $previewData;
    }
}
